subject: docs: retire HISTORY.md, add Communication section to CLAUDE.md
body:
Delete docs/HISTORY.md — git history is the source of truth for
completed work, so a parallel changelog is redundant and tends to rot.
Update CLAUDE.md TODO.md workflow to match ("delete completed items,
git tracks them") and remove the HISTORY.md subsection from the
Documentation rules.

Add top-level Communication section (peer-to-peer tone, no sycophancy,
ask before assuming, concrete options over open questions) between
Principles and Code Standards to match the glow-props scaffolding.
Update the header reminder line and remove the two AI Notes bullets
(ASK before assuming, Communication style) now covered there.

Tags: docs, communication, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: doc-scaffolding
Semver: patch
